summary: M3 evidence vector smoke namespace ingestion gate delivered. run_evidence_vector_smoke_gate.py wires evidence manifest → exporter → mock/policy-allowed provider upsert → query probe → dedupe/upsert manifest → rollback manifest. Production namespaces (-prod) are blocked unless --allow-production-namespace. Provider must be in policy allowlist; mock is permitted only for offline smoke. Batch size, retry, namespace, top-k, dedupe key fields all read from policy-vector-ingestion-hardening.json. 4 smoke tests (10 assertions) pass.

artifacts.description: Gate runner. Loads policy-vector-ingestion-hardening.json (allowed providers, dedupe key fields, upsert batch defaults, probe topK + minMatchCount), exports vector records, builds upsert manifest deduped by policy fields, runs provider upsert, runs probe, emits rollback manifest.
4 tests with 10 assertions: happy path probe finds expected record, production namespace blocked, unknown provider rejected, dedupe key fields read from policy.

End-to-end sample gate report with upsertManifest (3 entries deduped by namespace+id+sha256), probe topK=5 / matchCount>=1 / expected record present, rollbackManifest with deleteByRecordIds and deleteByDedupeKeys, deterministicSha256 inherited from exporter.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: smoke namespace upsert + query probe + dedupe manifest + rollback manifest
acceptanceMapping.evidence: Gate report fields upsertManifest, probe, rollbackManifest, recordCounts.deduped vs exported.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: provider must be in policy allowlist; production namespace disabled by default
acceptanceMapping.evidence: _resolve_allowed_providers + namespace endswith('-prod') guard + --allow-production-namespace gate. Smoke test asserts rejections.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: probe verifies expected record can be recalled; outputs topK, match count, namespace, provider
acceptanceMapping.evidence: Probe section includes query, expectedRecordId, topK, minRequiredMatchCount, matchCount, matchedRecordIds, probeOk.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: batch size, retry, backoff, namespace, limit all from policy/CLI/env
acceptanceMapping.evidence: upsertPolicy.defaultLimit / retryCount / retryBackoffSeconds + probePolicy.defaultTopK / minRequiredMatchCount + providerPolicy.allowedProviders read at runtime; CLI flags override (--top-k, --batch-size, --namespace, --provider).
